lines.text: Welcome, ladies and gentlemen, to the ultimate showdown of Peaks of Prestige!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: In this match, we present to you—
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The mysterious final Lord of Prestige, bearer of the title Conquerer of Prestige, and the strongest duelist in Peaks of Prestige—Furius!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The rising star who stormed through the ranks, bearer of five Medals of Prestige, and the very first challenger to the Conqueror of Prestige—{PlayerName}!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: And now, I declare—LET THE SHOWDOWN BEGIN!!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
